name: "Feature request"

title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]

## Problem / outcome

What outcome should this enable? Who benefits (which [persona](../../docs/00-overview/PERSONAS.md))?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the proposed capability.

## Scope

- **In scope:**
- **Out of scope:**

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Testable criterion 1
- [ ] Testable criterion 2

## Alignment

- Related docs:
- Roadmap phase ([Roadmap](../../docs/09-roadmap/ROADMAP.md)):
- Quality gates impacted ([Quality Gates](../../docs/04-quality/QUALITY_GATES.md)):

## Grounding

Cite any sources for claims/benchmarks (with access dates); mark unknowns `[UNVERIFIED]`.
